summary: BIQc production go-live readiness test at https://biqc.ai. Tested all 10 Phase 1 critical flows: auth, signup, calibration journey, advisor, and connect email. Production is on NEW Supabase (vwwandhoydemcybltoxz). Critical OAuth Outlook/Gmail blocker found: client_id=None and redirect_uri=localhost:8001.

test_credentials.status: Created on new Supabase, calibration skipped via API for advisor/connect-email testing

critical.issue: Microsoft OAuth redirect URL contains client_id=None and redirect_uri=http://localhost:8001/api/auth/outlook/callback. Azure Client ID not configured in production environment. OAuth callback redirects to localhost instead of https://biqc.ai/api/auth/outlook/callback. Connect Outlook is COMPLETELY BROKEN in production.
Same issue as Outlook - likely client_id/redirect_uri misconfigured. Backend environment variables AZURE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, and OAuth callback URLs not set for production domain.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not deployed or missing in production backend
Returns 404 - endpoint not deployed or missing in production backend

ui_bugs.issue: window.confirm() dialog on line 141 blocks calibration flow when confidence is Low. Since calibration Edge Function may not be deployed on new Supabase, ALL new user scans return Low confidence, meaning ALL users will see a native browser confirm dialog when clicking 'Yes — this is my business'. This is poor UX and blocks automated testing.

integration_issues.issue: Tutorial modal (z-index:9999) blocks Connect Outlook button click in automated tests and potentially for users who haven't dismissed the tutorial. Button works correctly after tutorial is dismissed via data-testid='tutorial-done-btn'. This is not a blocker for real users.

calibration-business-dna Edge Function on new Supabase (vwwandhoydemcybltoxz) returns no extracted_data for website scan (tested with www.camposbeans.com.au). All scans fall back to manual summary. Likely Edge Functions not deployed on new Supabase instance.

test_results_by_requirement.1_homepage: PASS - https://biqc.ai loads, hero section visible, nav and CTAs present
test_results_by_requirement.2_login_page: PASS - /login-supabase loads, email/password form visible, Google and Microsoft OAuth buttons present
test_results_by_requirement.3_oauth_redirect_check: PASS - Microsoft OAuth redirect contains vwwandhoydemcybltoxz (NEW Supabase). JWT ref also confirms new Supabase. OAuth redirects to biqc.ai (NOT beta.thestrategysquad.com). CORRECT.
test_results_by_requirement.4_new_user_signup: PASS - newtest1@biqctest.io registered successfully. Email confirmation toast appears but doesn't block session.
test_results_by_requirement.5_calibration_routing: PASS - After signup, user redirected to /calibration automatically
test_results_by_requirement.6_calibration_flow: PARTIAL - URL input shows, form submits with www.camposbeans.com.au, BUT scan falls back to manual summary (Edge Function returns no extracted_data on new Supabase). Manual summary path works.
test_results_by_requirement.7_calibration_completion: PARTIAL - Calibration flow progresses through manual_summary > identity_verification steps. window.confirm() dialog with Low confidence blocks automated completion testing. For real users this dialog is clickable. Post-completion routing uses window.location.href='/market' (no redirect loop).
test_results_by_requirement.8_post_calibration_dashboard: PASS - After marking calibration COMPLETE via /api/console/state, user routes to /market correctly. /market page loads with full navigation, Business Brief panel, SoundBoard AI Advisor.
test_results_by_requirement.9_advisor_page: PASS - /advisor loads with SoundBoard, greeting ('Good to meet you. I'm your Strategic Intelligence Advisor'), full navigation (INTELLIGENCE/EXECUTION/SYSTEMS/MARKETING/GOVERNANCE & LEGAL/BIQC LEGAL), 'Ask anything' input
test_results_by_requirement.10_connect_email: PARTIAL FAIL - /connect-email loads with Connect Outlook and Connect Gmail buttons. CRITICAL: Outlook OAuth URL has client_id=None and redirect_uri=http://localhost:8001 (not production URL). Microsoft sign-in page loads but OAuth will fail. Needs AZURE_CLIENT_ID and correct AZURE_REDIRECT_URI set in production backend environment.

action_items: CRITICAL: Set AZURE_CLIENT_ID (and AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET) environment variable on production backend (biqc.ai Azure deployment). Currently client_id=None causing OAuth to fail.
CRITICAL: Set AZURE_REDIRECT_URI to https://biqc.ai/api/auth/outlook/callback in production backend. Currently defaults to localhost:8001.
CRITICAL: Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET + GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI to production values for Gmail OAuth.

HIGH: Deploy calibration-business-dna Edge Function to new Supabase (vwwandhoydemcybltoxz). Currently all calibration scans fail and fall back to manual summary, degrading onboarding UX significantly.

MEDIUM: Replace window.confirm() with inline UI confirmation in ForensicIdentityCard.js line 141. Native browser dialogs are poor UX, especially when ALL users get Low confidence due to Edge Function issues.
MEDIUM: Deploy or fix /api/soundboard/scan-usage and /api/cognition/overview endpoints (returning 404).
INFO: Email confirmation is ON in new Supabase but doesn't block calibration (user gets session immediately). Consider turning OFF for smoother onboarding OR add clearer messaging.
INFO: Old Supabase users (trent-test1@biqc-test.com etc.) don't exist on new Supabase - expected if data migration not done.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: ConnectEmail.js calls /api/auth/outlook/login which uses localhost:8001 as base URL for OAuth callback - backend needs AZURE_REDIRECT_URI env var explicitly set to production URL
CRITICAL: Backend server.py needs AZURE_CLIENT_ID, AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET env vars configured in Azure deployment environment
HIGH: ForensicIdentityCard.js:141 uses window.confirm() for Low confidence - replace with inline confirmation UI
MEDIUM: /api/soundboard/scan-usage endpoint missing from backend server.py
MEDIUM: /api/cognition/overview endpoint missing from backend server.py
LOW: calibration-business-dna Edge Function needs to be deployed/enabled on new Supabase instance vwwandhoydemcybltoxz

success_rate.backend: 80% (core APIs work, OAuth config broken, 2 endpoints 404)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (most flows work, calibration scan degraded, Connect Outlook broken)

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is iteration 103. Production URL: https://biqc.ai. Test user: newtest1@biqctest.io / BIQcTest!2026 (calibration marked COMPLETE via POST /api/console/state with step=9, status=COMPLETE). Key issues: (1) Outlook/Gmail OAuth broken - client_id=None and redirect_uri=localhost:8001 in production backend (2) Calibration Edge Functions not deployed on new Supabase - all scans fall back to manual summary. When retesting: use [data-testid='tutorial-done-btn'] to dismiss tutorial modals. Accept window.confirm() dialogs with page.on('dialog', ...). New Supabase vwwandhoydemcybltoxz confirmed active. No redirect loop. Advisor and market pages load correctly.

outlook_oauth_broken.root_cause: Production backend Azure deployment is missing AZURE_CLIENT_ID, AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET, and AZURE_REDIRECT_URI environment variables. The backend defaults to None/localhost for these values.
outlook_oauth_broken.mitigation: Set AZURE_CLIENT_ID, AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET, AZURE_REDIRECT_URI=https://biqc.ai/api/auth/outlook/callback in Azure App Service environment variables. Also register the production callback URL in Azure AD App Registration.

calibration_scan_degraded.root_cause: Supabase Edge Function 'calibration-business-dna' not deployed or not returning extracted_data on new Supabase instance vwwandhoydemcybltoxz. Manual testing confirmed all URL scans return empty data.
calibration_scan_degraded.mitigation: Deploy calibration-business-dna Edge Function to new Supabase project. Check Edge Function logs in Supabase dashboard for vwwandhoydemcybltoxz.
